chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: This might be the cutest TWS I have ever got.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: You get a box like this.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: Let's open this.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: You get this TWS on top.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: The case looks quite small.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: Then you get a LAN card, some ear tips and a user manual.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: So this is the Realme T500 Pro and honestly, I love the feel of this.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: It looks quite cute.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: And you can see how compact it looks compared to my AirPods while carrying the same size of earbuds.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: Even the earbuds are quite comfortable to wear.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: And it gets stuck.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: It won't drop easily.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: It comes with Hi-Res Audio plus LHDC 5.0 support and a big 12.4 mm titanium driver.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: So you get a loud and clear sound.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: The bass is also quite solid.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: You can also change to different EQ modes.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: Even you can also customize your own custom EQ.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: The biggest highlight is that you get 10 dB active noise cancellation.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: It's quite rare to get such a loud noise cancellation in this price segment.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: And I haven't heard such a good sound in this budget.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: You get a total of 56 hours of playback time.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: And after charging for 10 minutes, you get an approximate 10 hours of playback time.

chunks.title: REALME-T500-PRO-Best
chunks.text: And with all this, you get this under Rs 3,000.

text: This might be the cutest TWS I have ever got. You get a box like this. Let's open this. You get this TWS on top. The case looks quite small. Then you get a LAN card, some ear tips and a user manual. So this is the Realme T500 Pro and honestly, I love the feel of this. It looks quite cute. And you can see how compact it looks compared to my AirPods while carrying the same size of earbuds. Even the earbuds are quite comfortable to wear. And it gets stuck. It won't drop easily. It comes with Hi-Res Audio plus LHDC 5.0 support and a big 12.4 mm titanium driver. So you get a loud and clear sound. The bass is also quite solid. You can also change to different EQ modes. Even you can also customize your own custom EQ. The biggest highlight is that you get 10 dB active noise cancellation. It's quite rare to get such a loud noise cancellation in this price segment. And I haven't heard such a good sound in this budget. You get a total of 56 hours of playback time. And after charging for 10 minutes, you get an approximate 10 hours of playback time. And with all this, you get this under Rs 3,000.
